name: RSS Feed Indexer
description: Indexes the local operator's configured RSS and OPML feeds daily into plugin-owned LanceDB vector storage and exposes an RSS query tool.

settings.label: RSS or OPML URLs
settings.description: Local list of HTTPS RSS feed URLs or OPML subscription-list URLs to index. This plugin uses unsafe all-domain HTTPS access and must treat fetched content as untrusted.

access.name: RSS: Query
access.description: Expose semantic and date-range search over the local RSS index.

tools.name: rss_query
tools.description: Search indexed RSS items by optional startDate, endDate, and/or semantic query q. At least one option is required.
